channel.title: Criminal Legacy
channel.description: From Wild West outlaws to mob bosses — the complete criminal histories of history's most notorious figures. A true crime history podcast that goes deep on the killers, gangsters, and outlaws who shaped our world.
channel.itunes:author: Criminal Legacy
channel.itunes:summary: From Wild West outlaws to mob bosses — the complete criminal histories of history's most notorious figures.

item.title: Criminal Legacy: Billy The Kid
item.description:
Criminal Legacy Episode 1: Billy the Kid
📚 Further Reading: • Billy the Kid: A Short and Violent Life by Robert M. Utley (1989) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Billy+the+Kid%3A+A+Short+and+Violent+Life+Robert+M.+Utley&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • The Illustrated Life and Times of Billy the Kid by Richard K. Scoppettone (2005) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=The+Illustrated+Life+and+Times+of+Billy+the+Kid+Richard+K.+Scoppettone&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • Billy the Kid: Beyond the Legend by Richard N. Ellis (2003) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Billy+the+Kid%3A+Beyond+the+Legend+Richard+N.+Ellis&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • To Hell on a Fast Horse: Billy the Kid, Pat Garrett, and the Epic Chase to Justice in the Old West by Mark Lee Gardner (2010) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=To+Hell+on+a+Fast+Horse%3A+Billy+the+Kid%2C+Pat+Garrett%2C+and+the+Epic+Chase+to+Justice+in+the+Old+West+Mark+Lee+Gardner&tag=foremanbluepr-20
Subscribe to Criminal Legacy wherever you get your podcasts.
--- This post contains Amazon af

item.title: Criminal Legacy: Jesse James
item.description:
Criminal Legacy Episode 2: Jesse James
📚 Further Reading: • Jesse James: Last Rebel of the Civil War by T.J. Stiles (2002) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Jesse+James%3A+Last+Rebel+of+the+Civil+War+T.J.+Stiles&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • The Assassination of Jesse James by the Coward Robert Ford by Ron Hansen (1983) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=The+Assassination+of+Jesse+James+by+the+Coward+Robert+Ford+Ron+Hansen&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • Jesse James: The Man and the Myth by Marley Brant (1998) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Jesse+James%3A+The+Man+and+the+Myth+Marley+Brant&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • Shot All to Hell: Jesse James, the Northfield Raid, and the Wild West's Greatest Escape by Mark Lee Gardner (2013) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Shot+All+to+Hell%3A+Jesse+James%2C+the+Northfield+Raid%2C+and+the+Wild+West%27s+Greatest+Escape+Mark+Lee+Gardner&tag=foremanbluepr-20
Subscribe to Criminal Legacy wherever you get your podcasts.
--- This post contains Amazon affiliate links. We earn a small commi

item.title: Criminal Legacy: Butch Cassidy
item.description:
Criminal Legacy Episode 3: Butch Cassidy
📚 Further Reading: • Butch Cassidy: Beyond the Myth by Charles Kelly (1996) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Butch+Cassidy%3A+Beyond+the+Myth+Charles+Kelly&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • Butch Cassidy: A Biography by James D. Horan (1976) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Butch+Cassidy%3A+A+Biography+James+D.+Horan&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • The Outlaw Trail: A History of Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid by Charles Kelly (1994) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=The+Outlaw+Trail%3A+A+History+of+Butch+Cassidy+and+the+Sundance+Kid+Charles+Kelly&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid: The Real Story Behind Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid by Bill Betenson (2004) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Butch+Cassidy+and+the+Sundance+Kid%3A+The+Real+Story+Behind+Butch+Cassidy+and+the+Sundance+Kid+Bill+Betenson&tag=foremanbluepr-20
Subscribe to Criminal Legacy wherever you get your podcasts.
--- This post contains Amazon affiliate links. We earn a small commissio

item.title: Criminal Legacy: Belle Starr
item.description:
Criminal Legacy Episode 4: Belle Starr
📚 Further Reading: • Belle Starr: The Bandit Queen by Phillip W. Steele (1989) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Belle+Starr%3A+The+Bandit+Queen+Phillip+W.+Steele&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • Belle Starr and Her Times: The Literature, the Facts and the Legends by Glenn Shirley (1982) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Belle+Starr+and+Her+Times%3A+The+Literature%2C+the+Facts+and+the+Legends+Glenn+Shirley&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • The Woman Who Loved Outlaws: The True Story of Pearl Hart and Belle Starr by Chris Enss (2011) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=The+Woman+Who+Loved+Outlaws%3A+The+True+Story+of+Pearl+Hart+and+Belle+Starr+Chris+Enss&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • Belle Starr: A Novel of Love, Lies, and Larceny by Specht, Susan (2006) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Belle+Starr%3A+A+Novel+of+Love%2C+Lies%2C+and+Larceny+Specht%2C+Susan&tag=foremanbluepr-20
Subscribe to Criminal Legacy wherever you get your podcasts.
--- This post contains Amazon affiliate links. We earn a s

item.title: Criminal Legacy: John Wesley Hardin
item.description:
Criminal Legacy Episode 5: John Wesley Hardin
📚 Further Reading: • The Life of John Wesley Hardin: As Written by Himself by John Wesley Hardin (1896) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=The+Life+of+John+Wesley+Hardin%3A+As+Written+by+Himself+John+Wesley+Hardin&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • John Wesley Hardin: Dark Angel of Texas by Leon C. Metz (1996) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=John+Wesley+Hardin%3A+Dark+Angel+of+Texas+Leon+C.+Metz&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • John Wesley Hardin: Texas Gunfighter by Chuck Parsons (2019) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=John+Wesley+Hardin%3A+Texas+Gunfighter+Chuck+Parsons&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • The Notorious John Wesley Hardin: Outlaw, Lawman, and Murderer by Leon C. Metz (2001) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=The+Notorious+John+Wesley+Hardin%3A+Outlaw%2C+Lawman%2C+and+Murderer+Leon+C.+Metz&tag=foremanbluepr-20
Subscribe to Criminal Legacy wherever you get your podcasts.
--- This post contains Amazon affiliate links. We earn a small commission on qualifying purchases at no e

item.title: Criminal Legacy: Cole Younger
item.description:
Criminal Legacy Episode 6: Cole Younger
📚 Further Reading: • The Story of Cole Younger by Cole Younger (1903) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=The+Story+of+Cole+Younger+Cole+Younger&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • Cole Younger, Last of the Great Outlaws by Carl W. Breihan (1970) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Cole+Younger%2C+Last+of+the+Great+Outlaws+Carl+W.+Breihan&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • The Cole Younger Story by Carl W. Breihan (1964) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=The+Cole+Younger+Story+Carl+W.+Breihan&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • Cole Younger: Confederate Guerrilla, Outlaw and Prisoner by James D. Horan (1984) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Cole+Younger%3A+Confederate+Guerrilla%2C+Outlaw+and+Prisoner+James+D.+Horan&tag=foremanbluepr-20
Subscribe to Criminal Legacy wherever you get your podcasts.
--- This post contains Amazon affiliate links. We earn a small commission on qualifying purchases at no extra cost to you.

item.title: Criminal Legacy: Black Bart
item.description:
Criminal Legacy Episode 7: Black Bart
📚 Further Reading: • Black Bart: The Poet Bandit by George Arbios (1995) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Black+Bart%3A+The+Poet+Bandit+George+Arbios&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • Black Bart: American Literary Outlaw by Jeffrey Graebner (2015) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Black+Bart%3A+American+Literary+Outlaw+Jeffrey+Graebner&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • Stagecoach: Wells Fargo and the American West by Philip L. Fradkin (2003) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Stagecoach%3A+Wells+Fargo+and+the+American+West+Philip+L.+Fradkin&tag=foremanbluepr-20 • Outlaw Tales of California: True Stories of the Golden State's Most Infamous Crooks, Culprits, and Cutthroats by Woody Haney (2004) — https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Outlaw+Tales+of+California%3A+True+Stories+of+the+Golden+State%27s+Most+Infamous+Crooks%2C+Culprits%2C+and+Cutthroats+Woody+Haney&tag=foremanbluepr-20
Subscribe to Criminal Legacy wherever you get your podcasts.
